rules.description: かな -> [VK1=1] ／ 単独: かな
変換 -> [VK1=1] ／ 単独: かな
英数 -> [VK2=1] ／ 単独: 英数
無変換 -> [VK2=1] ／ 単独: 英数
ITerm2: VK1+U -> vim: go to line head (0)
ITerm2: VK1+I -> vim: go to line tail ($)
ITerm2: VK1+Z -> tmux: enter copy mode
VSCode: VK4+C -> GitHub Copilot: Open Completions Panel
VSCode: VK4+G -> GitLens: Open File on Remote
VSCode: VK4+J -> Codex: Focus on Codex View
VSCode: VK4+N -> Go to next problem
VSCode: VK4+T -> Go to workspace symbol
VSCode: VK4+U -> Go to next reference
VSCode: VK4+V -> Copy active file relative path
VSCode: VK4+W -> Claude Code: Open in Side Bar
VSCode: VK4+Z -> Focus on Source Control: Changes view
VSCode: VK4+1 -> Split the editor to the left
VSCode: VK4+2 -> Split the editor to the bottom
VSCode: VK4+3 -> Split the editor to the top
VSCode: VK4+4 -> Split the editor to the right
Dynalist: VK1+U -> go to line head
Dynalist: VK1+I -> go to line tail
VK1+F -> Escape + 英数 (switch to English input)
VK1+⇧Y -> copy + strip newlines and repeated spaces

to.shell_command:
export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8; pbpaste | tr -d '
' | sed 's/  */ /g' | pbcopy

osascript -e 'set currentVolume to input volume of (get volume settings)' -e 'set nextVolume to currentVolume - 10' -e 'if nextVolume < 0 then set nextVolume to 0' -e 'set volume input volume nextVolume'; open -g 'xbar://app.xbarapp.com/refreshPlugin?path=mic-slider.60s.sh'

osascript -e 'set currentVolume to input volume of (get volume settings)' -e 'set nextVolume to currentVolume + 10' -e 'if nextVolume > 100 then set nextVolume to 100' -e 'set volume input volume nextVolume'; open -g 'xbar://app.xbarapp.com/refreshPlugin?path=mic-slider.60s.sh'

rules.description: VK2+G -> Visual Studio Code 起動
VK2+U -> Microsoft To Do 起動
VK3+(ja) O -> type half-width [] with cursor inside
新下駄オフ: F12 -> enable shingeta layout
新下駄: F12 -> disable shingeta layout
英数 -> 英数 (disable shingeta mode)
かな -> かな (enable shingeta mode)
新下駄: L+1 -> L Y A
新下駄: L+2 -> M Y A
新下駄: L+3 -> M Y U
新下駄: L+4 -> M Y O
新下駄: L+5 -> L W A
新下駄: L+R -> T H I
新下駄: L+T -> D H I
新下駄: S+Y -> S H E
新下駄: D+@ -> U L O
新下駄: S+/ -> C H E
新下駄: I+1 -> L Y U
新下駄: I+2 -> B Y A
新下駄: I+3 -> B Y U
新下駄: I+4 -> B Y O
新下駄: I+Q -> H Y U
新下駄: I+W -> S H U
新下駄: I+E -> S H O
新下駄: I+R -> K Y U
新下駄: I+T -> C H U
新下駄: I+A -> H Y O
新下駄: I+F -> K Y O
新下駄: I+G -> C H O
新下駄: I+Z -> H Y A
新下駄: I+X -> V U L A
新下駄: I+C -> S H A
新下駄: I+V -> K Y A
新下駄: I+B -> C H A
新下駄: O+1 -> L Y O
新下駄: O+2 -> P Y A
新下駄: O+3 -> P Y U
新下駄: O+4 -> P Y O
新下駄: O+Q -> R Y U
新下駄: O+R -> G Y U
新下駄: O+T -> N Y U
新下駄: O+A -> R Y O
新下駄: O+F -> G Y O
新下駄: O+G -> N Y O
新下駄: O+Z -> R Y A
新下駄: O+X -> D H U
新下駄: O+V -> G Y A
新下駄: O+B -> N Y A
新下駄: T -> C H I
新下駄: G -> L T U
新下駄: B -> T S U
